metadata.title: Godel: Unprovable Truths
metadata.clock: audio-first; EST word-weighting until forced alignment replaces it

beats.teach: Title card.
beats.fill_prompt: Vox editorial title card on newsprint ground (#F3EBDD), charcoal serif (#2F2A26): 'GODEL' large, 'UNPROVABLE TRUTHS' beneath, hairline underline; small credit line 'Nik Bear Brown · Tuzi Brown · Marley Brown'. One accent: dusty blue.

beats.lyric: Consider dis sentence ya / Dis yah statement is false
beats.caption: Consider dis sentence — 'This statement is false'
beats.teach: The Liar sentence is typed onto the page and boxed.
beats.fill_prompt: Manim: a single serif line 'This statement is false.' types on, then a thin ink box draws around it. Newsprint ground, charcoal type, no color.

beats.lyric: So... it true
beats.caption: So... it true?
beats.teach: Holographic paradox loop (pantry).
beats.fill_prompt: [pantry] Floating holographic 'This statement is false', looped paradox.

beats.lyric: If a true, dat mean it false / But if a false, den it haffi be true / Yuh see it
beats.caption: If true -> it's false. If false -> it's true.
beats.teach: Two arrows chase each other: TRUE -> FALSE -> TRUE, a closed loop that never settles.
beats.fill_prompt: Manim: two labels TRUE and FALSE with curved arrows forming a loop between them; a dot ping-pongs and never rests. Charcoal + one dusty-blue accent.

beats.lyric: Just by talkin 'bout itself / It mash up reason like it twis' back pon itself
beats.caption: It talks about itself — reason twists back on itself
beats.teach: Equations folding into recursion (pantry).
beats.fill_prompt: [pantry] Equations folding in on themselves, endless recursion.

beats.lyric: A real paradox, bredda / So if it nah true, and it nah false / Wha it really be
beats.caption: A real paradox — not true, not false. So what is it?
beats.teach: Label chip 'PARADOX'; the sentence sits with a '?' where its truth value should be.
beats.fill_prompt: Manim: accent block chip reading 'PARADOX' (white serif on dusty-blue), the boxed sentence below with a large '?' where TRUE/FALSE would be.

beats.lyric: Mi know it might sound like some fool-fool brain game / But round di early 1900s
beats.caption: Sounds like a brain game — but around the early 1900s...
beats.teach: A century timeline; a pin drops on 'early 1900s'.
beats.fill_prompt: Manim/DOCUMENT: horizontal timeline 1900..2000 on newsprint, a marker pin lands near 1900-1910 with serif label 'early 1900s'.

beats.lyric: One man name Kurt Gödel / Tek it serious—an' change di whole maths game
beats.caption: One man — Kurt Gödel — took it seriously
beats.teach: Gödel by candlelight (pantry); name plate 'KURT GÖDEL, 1906–1978' at assembly.
beats.fill_prompt: [pantry] Godel working by candlelight in a mechanical study, blackboard. (Assembly overlays name plate KURT GODEL 1906-1978.)

beats.lyric: Him discovery / It show seh math have limits, yuh zee it
beats.caption: His discovery: math has limits
beats.teach: A bounded region labelled MATH; one star (a truth) sits OUTSIDE the boundary.
beats.fill_prompt: Manim: a rounded boundary labelled 'MATH (what we can prove)'; inside, small ticks; one star clearly outside the line, labelled 'true'. Terracotta accent on the star only.

beats.lyric: A proof now, dat a just a solid argument / Fi show why one number statement haffi be true
beats.caption: A proof = a solid chain of steps to a true statement
beats.teach: Definition: PROOF = step -> step -> step => statement TRUE.
beats.fill_prompt: Manim: three stacked step boxes connected by down-arrows, terminating in a chip 'TRUE'. Serif labels, one accent.

beats.lyric: But fi build dem kinda argument / Yuh start wid some base—called axioms / Dem a di rule dem / Dat nuh need no more proof
beats.caption: Every proof starts from axioms — base rules that need no proof
beats.teach: Isotype row of 'axiom' blocks at the foundation; a small seal 'no proof needed'.
beats.fill_prompt: Manim: a foundation row of identical square blocks labelled AXIOM (isotype, one unit per mark); a serif caption 'assumed, not proved'.

beats.lyric: Everything inna math / From di likkle one-two-three / To di biggest theory dem / All start from axiom dem
beats.caption: From 1-2-3 to the biggest theorems — all from axioms
beats.teach: Infinite staircase of axioms (pantry).
beats.fill_prompt: [pantry] An infinite staircase of axioms leading into fog, unreachable.

beats.lyric: So if a statement bout numbers true / Yuh shoulda be able fi prove it / Using dem axioms
beats.caption: If a statement about numbers is true, you should be able to prove it
beats.teach: Pipeline: STATEMENT + AXIOMS -> PROOF -> TRUE. The dream of completeness.
beats.fill_prompt: Manim: 'statement about numbers' + 'axioms' feed an arrow into 'proof' into 'TRUE'. Clean flow, one accent.

beats.lyric: From Ancient Greece till now / Mathematician been using dat method / Fi prove or disprove everything / Clean and neat, no doubt
beats.caption: From Ancient Greece onward — prove or disprove, clean and neat
beats.teach: Euclid's Elements scan; a long arrow 'Ancient Greece -> now'.
beats.fill_prompt: DOCUMENT: a page of Euclid's Elements (archival scan), desaturated on newsprint, a highlighter bar under a proposition; arrow spanning 'Ancient Greece -> now'.

beats.lyric: But when Gödel step inna di scene / Di math world did a wobble / Paradoxes start show up / An people start fret
beats.caption: Gödel steps in — the math world wobbles
beats.teach: Paradox explodes into fractal shards (pantry).
beats.fill_prompt: [pantry] Boom effect: mathematical paradox explodes into fractal shards.

beats.lyric: Big name mathematicians / Did want fi prove seh math cyaan go wrong
beats.caption: Hilbert's dream: prove math can never contradict itself
beats.teach: Hilbert's program: a seal reading COMPLETE + CONSISTENT stamped over 'all of mathematics'.
beats.fill_prompt: Manim: a wax-seal / stamp motif stamping 'COMPLETE + CONSISTENT' onto a block 'ALL OF MATHEMATICS'. Name chip 'Hilbert, 1900'.

beats.lyric: But Gödel / Him never too sure / Matter of fact—him doubt if math / Even di right tool fi ask di big question
beats.caption: But Gödel doubted math was even the right tool
beats.teach: Zoom on Gödel-bot metal face, gears turning (pantry).
beats.fill_prompt: [pantry] Zoom on Godel's metal face, gears rotating slowly inside his head.

beats.lyric: Words / Dem easy fi tangle up pon demself / But numbers / Dem usually straight—true or false
beats.caption: Words tangle. Numbers stay straight — true or false.
beats.teach: Left: a knotted word 'sentence'. Right: a clean number with TRUE/FALSE tags.
beats.fill_prompt: Manim split: left a tangled scribble labelled 'words'; right a crisp integer labelled 'numbers' with two tags TRUE / FALSE. Terracotta vs dusty-blue.

beats.lyric: Still... Gödel get one idea / Him turn equations into numbers—code dem
beats.caption: Gödel's idea: turn equations into numbers — code them
beats.teach: Typewriter typing Gödel-numbering code (pantry).
beats.fill_prompt: [pantry] Mechanical typewriter typing out Godel-numbering code, numbers.

beats.lyric: So now, yuh can write one big statement / An represent it with just one number / Crazy, right
beats.caption: A whole statement becomes a single number
beats.teach: Gödel numbering: symbols -> primes -> one big number. Show a tiny worked encoding.
beats.fill_prompt: Manim: a short formula's symbols each map to a small number, combined (2^a·3^b·5^c...) into one large integer, which is boxed and labelled 'the statement, as a number'.

beats.lyric: By doing dat, math start chat 'bout itself / Math get self-aware
beats.caption: Now math can talk about itself — math becomes self-aware
beats.teach: Equations folding recursion, second instance (pantry).
beats.fill_prompt: [pantry] Equations folding in on themselves, endless recursion (self-reference).

beats.lyric: And him write / Dis statement cyaan be proved / As one equation
beats.caption: He writes G: 'This statement cannot be proved' — as a number
beats.teach: The sentence G appears in words, then collapses into its Gödel number G.
beats.fill_prompt: Manim: 'G:  This statement cannot be proved.' typed, then the words dissolve into a single boxed integer labelled G. One accent on G.

viz.content: G: This statement cannot be proved.

beats.lyric: Now, dis different from di sentence we start wid / Cah math nuh play / It must be true or false / So which one it be
beats.caption: Unlike the Liar, math must be true or false. So which is G?
beats.teach: A fork: G branches into two boxes, TRUE and FALSE — which one?
beats.fill_prompt: Manim: node 'G' forks into two boxes TRUE and FALSE with a hand-drawn '?' ring around the fork.

beats.lyric: If it false—dat mean it can be proved / But if it can be proved—den it true / But wait… if it true / An still cyaan prove it / Dat mean it true, but unprovable
beats.caption: If false -> provable -> true (contradiction). So G is TRUE but UNPROVABLE.
beats.teach: The core deduction as a decision tree ending on a chip 'TRUE but UNPROVABLE'.
beats.fill_prompt: Manim decision tree: 'G false' -> 'G provable' -> 'G true' flagged CONTRADICTION (terracotta); the surviving branch resolves to a chip 'TRUE but UNPROVABLE' (dusty-blue). This is the payoff frame.

beats.lyric: Madness / But genius same way
beats.caption: Madness — but genius, same way
beats.teach: Gödel-bot fading into infinity (pantry).
beats.fill_prompt: [pantry] Black-and-white stylized portrait of Godel-bot fading into infinity.

beats.lyric: Dis shake up di whole foundation / Math cyaan hold every truth / Some truth always ago hide / Just outta reach
beats.caption: Incompleteness: math can't hold every truth
beats.teach: The MATH boundary from B08 returns, now cracked; several truths sit outside, out of reach.
beats.fill_prompt: Manim: the boundary 'MATH' develops a hairline crack; three stars labelled 'true' float outside it, dimmed, tagged 'unreachable'.

beats.lyric: Even if yuh try patch di gap / By adding more axioms / Guess wha / More unprovable truth ago pop up
beats.caption: Patch the gap with a new axiom -> a new unprovable truth appears
beats.teach: Add an axiom block to the foundation; immediately a new star pops OUTSIDE. Repeat gesture implied.
beats.fill_prompt: Manim: an AXIOM block slides into the foundation; the boundary grows; but a fresh 'true' star blinks into existence just outside the new line.

beats.lyric: No matter how much yuh add / Unprovable truth still deh deh / It's Gödel pon top a Gödel / All di way down
beats.caption: Gödel on top of Gödel — all the way down
beats.teach: Digital vines of logic branching endlessly (pantry).
beats.fill_prompt: [pantry] Digital vines of logic branching out endlessly, roots made of numbers.

beats.lyric: It mash up plenty dreams / Of one perfect math world / Where every question get answer
beats.caption: It broke the dream of a perfect math where every question is answered
beats.teach: Hilbert's COMPLETE+CONSISTENT seal from B15 returns, now cracked / stamped VOID.
beats.fill_prompt: Manim: the 'COMPLETE + CONSISTENT' seal from earlier cracks down the middle; a faint stamp 'incomplete' overlays it.

beats.lyric: Some mathematicians accept it / Some fight it / Some even try ignore di hole / Wha open up under dem
beats.caption: Reactions: accept it · fight it · ignore the hole
beats.teach: Three labelled reaction cards: ACCEPT / FIGHT / IGNORE, one with a hole beneath it.
beats.fill_prompt: Manim: three serif cards in a row — ACCEPT, FIGHT, IGNORE — the last with a dark circular 'hole' opening under its feet.

beats.lyric: But truth / More and more problems / Start show demself unprovable / People start worry / If dem whole career based pon smoke
beats.caption: More and more problems turn out unprovable
beats.teach: A tally that keeps ticking up: 'proven unprovable' count climbs (isotype squares filling).
beats.fill_prompt: Manim: an isotype tally labelled 'shown unprovable' fills square by square, count climbing; a couple of name-stubs (Halting problem, Continuum hypothesis) fade in as examples.

beats.lyric: But still, Gödel's work / Never just close doors / It open new one
beats.caption: Gödel's work didn't just close doors — it opened new ones
beats.teach: One door labelled 'certainty' closes; an adjacent door labelled 'new math' opens with light.
beats.fill_prompt: Manim: two serif-labelled doors; the left ('certainty') swings shut, the right ('new mathematics') opens, a golden highlighter bar of light across the threshold.

beats.lyric: Unprovable truths / Light di path fi early computers / An even today / Some genius still out deh / Try spot di truths / Yuh cyaan prove
beats.caption: Unprovable truths lit the path to the first computers
beats.teach: Digital vines / logic -> machines (pantry); name-stub 'Turing, 1936' at assembly.
beats.fill_prompt: [pantry] Digital vines of logic branching, roots of numbers, resolving toward machine forms. (Assembly overlays 'Turing, 1936'.)

beats.lyric: So yeah, some certainty get lost / But thanks to Gödel / We find beauty inna di unknown / Right inna di heart / Of truth itself
beats.caption: Some certainty lost — but beauty found in the unknown
beats.teach: The 'unreachable' stars from B25 re-render as quiet points of light — reframed as beauty, not loss.
beats.fill_prompt: Manim: the outside 'true / unreachable' stars brighten gently into a small constellation labelled 'the unknown'; the crack stays but reads calm, not alarming.

beats.lyric: Him build a code fi numbers talk 'bout numbers / Fi math start reason wid itself
beats.caption: He built a code for numbers to talk about numbers
beats.teach: Typewriter code reprise (pantry).
beats.fill_prompt: [pantry] Mechanical typewriter typing Godel-numbering code (reprise).

beats.lyric: An' den... boom / Him write a ting weh seh / This statement cyaan be proved
beats.caption: And then — boom — 'This statement cannot be proved'
beats.teach: Boom -> fractals reprise (pantry).
beats.fill_prompt: [pantry] Boom effect, paradox explodes into fractal shards (reprise).

beats.lyric: If it false—den it get proved / But if it get proved—den it cyaan false / So it haffi be true / But still... unprovable
beats.caption: False -> proved -> true. So: TRUE but unprovable.
beats.teach: The B23 payoff chip restated fast: 'TRUE but UNPROVABLE'.
beats.fill_prompt: Manim: quick restatement of the decision, landing hard on the chip 'TRUE but UNPROVABLE'.

beats.lyric: Dat mash up di whole idea seh math can hold all truth / Cause no matter how much yuh add / New truths always a hide outta reach
beats.caption: No matter how much you add, new truths always hide out of reach
beats.teach: The patch-loop from B26, sped up: add axiom -> new star -> add -> new star, receding.
beats.fill_prompt: Manim: the add-axiom / new-star gesture repeats and recedes into the distance (Godel all the way down).

beats.lyric: It deep / It paradox / It Gödel / All di way down
beats.caption: It's deep. It's paradox. It's Gödel — all the way down.
beats.teach: Gödel-bot fading into infinity, final (pantry).
beats.fill_prompt: [pantry] Black-and-white Godel-bot fading into infinity (final).

beats.teach: Endcard + credits.
beats.fill_prompt: Vox endcard on newsprint: 'KURT GODEL · 1931 · On Formally Undecidable Propositions'; small line 'Incompleteness'; credits 'Nik Bear Brown · Tuzi Brown · Marley Brown'.
